user.title: Add Whatsminer (Ethan's Mod)
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Whatsminer ASIC miner.

data_description.host: The IP address of your Whatsminer
data_description.name: A friendly name for this miner (defaults to IP address)
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the miner for updates (10-300 seconds)
data_description.power_min: Minimum power limit for the power slider
data_description.power_max: Maximum power limit for the power slider

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the miner. Please check the IP address and ensure the miner is online.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication. Please check the password.

init.title: Whatsminer Options: Connection & PID Core
init.description: Configure connection settings, power bounds, target temperature, and PID gains.

data.default_power_limit: Default Power Limit (W, applied when PID Mode turns off)

data_description.password: The API password for the miner
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the miner for updates (10-300 seconds)
data_description.power_min: Minimum power limit for the power slider
data_description.power_max: Maximum power limit for the power slider
data_description.pid_target_temp: Target temperature for the PID controller (°F)
data_description.pid_kp: Proportional gain - controls response to current error
data_description.default_power_limit: Power limit applied when PID Mode is disabled

safety.title: Whatsminer Options: Thermal Safety
safety.description: Configure chip and supply temperature safety caps and lockout thresholds.

data_description.chip_temp_safety_cap: Hard override clamps power to minimum when chip temp exceeds this threshold
data_description.pid_supply_temp_safety_cap: Soft cap - forces power_min when supply temp exceeds this threshold
data_description.pid_supply_temp_lockout: Hard lockout - stops mining when supply temp exceeds this threshold (requires manual reset)

demand.title: Whatsminer Options: Demand & Envelope
demand.description: Configure demand entities that control when the PID requests power.

data_description.pid_demand_entities: Climate entities to monitor for heating demand. When all are idle, power is clamped to minimum.

feedforward.title: Whatsminer Options: Feedforward & Compensation
feedforward.description: Configure external temperature sensor and feedforward compensation.

data_description.external_temp_sensor: Temperature sensor used as the PID process variable (required for PID Mode)

envelopes.title: Whatsminer Options: Price & Surplus
envelopes.description: Configure price and surplus envelope signals (for future expansion).

tuning.title: Whatsminer Options: Tuning & Throttling
tuning.description: Configure step bands, adjust intervals, integral band, and ramp rate.

data_description.pid_min_power_step: Minimum power step when far from setpoint (coarse)
data_description.pid_min_power_step_medium: Minimum power step when moderately close to setpoint
data_description.pid_min_power_step_fine: Minimum power step when very close to setpoint (fine)
data_description.pid_coarse_step_band: Error threshold for coarse step (far from setpoint)
data_description.pid_fine_step_band: Error threshold for fine step (close to setpoint)
data_description.pid_integral_band: Error band for conditional integral freeze (0 disables)
data_description.pid_setpoint_ramp_rate: Max rate at which setpoint changes (0 disables ramping)
